name: Deep Book Absorption (Tightened)
hypothesis: Per feedback for iter015_deep_book_vs_tradeflow_divergence, a stronger divergence signal—defined by a more resilient deep bid book (obi_ex_bbo > 0.4) absorbing more aggressive selling pressure (trade imbalance z-score < -2.5)—should yield a higher win rate and expectancy.
mutation_note: Tightened both thresholds (obi_ex_bbo > 0.3 to > 0.4; z-score < -2.0 to < -2.5) to isolate higher-conviction absorption events.
